product_overview: SkillEX is a community-driven marketplace that lets users list skills and resources and exchange them via an internal credits system or direct bartering. The SPA enables discovery, listing creation, trades with escrow semantics, real-time messaging, and reviews.
core_goals: Discover and browse skill/resource listings relevant to the user's needs and location
Create and publish listings to offer skills, books, or services
Initiate and complete trades using credits or barter with escrow protections
Communicate with other users via real-time messaging to negotiate and execute trades
Maintain trust through post-trade reviews and a reputation system

features.name: User Signup
features.description: Create a new account by providing basic profile information and selecting a user type and location.
user_flows: / -> Start signup -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Fill in name -> Select user type -> Select location -> Submit signup form -> See dashboard
/ -> Start signup -> Fill in email with invalid format -> Fill in password -> Submit signup form -> See inline validation error for email

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate with email and password to access private areas of the app.
user_flows: / -> Navigate to /#dashboard (after auth) -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See dashboard
/ -> Fill in email -> Fill in password (incorrect) -> Submit login form -> See error message on invalid credentials
/ -> Fill in password -> Toggle password visibility -> Submit login form -> See dashboard

features.name: Marketplace Discovery
features.description: Browse and filter marketplace listings; search listings and verify personal listings are excluded.
user_flows: /#marketplace -> See listings -> Use basic search -> See filtered listings that match query
/#marketplace -> Apply location and type filters -> See narrowed listing results -> Verify own listings are not shown

features.name: Create Listing
features.description: Publish a new listing describing a skill, resource, book, or service with type, experience level, and credit price.
user_flows: /#create-listing -> Fill form (title, description, type, experience level, credit price) -> Submit form -> Navigate to /#marketplace -> See listing in marketplace
/#create-listing -> Fill form with price above allowed cap for selected experience level -> Submit form -> See inline validation error for price

features.name: Trade Flow (Credit & Barter)
features.description: Initiate and manage trades for listings using credits or barter; track status and complete to release escrow.
user_flows: /#marketplace -> Find listing of interest -> Initiate trade -> Confirm trade terms -> See trade appear in /#trades -> Mark trade as completed -> See trade status updated to completed
/#marketplace -> Find listing -> Initiate barter trade -> Both parties mark trade as complete -> See trade status updated to completed

features.name: Messaging
features.description: Real-time chat between users to negotiate terms and coordinate delivery.
user_flows: /#messages -> Select conversation -> Send message -> See sent message appear in chat -> See incoming message appear in chat

features.name: Reviews & Ratings
features.description: Leave a rating and optional text review for the counterparty after a completed trade to build trust.
user_flows: /#trades -> Open completed trade -> Submit review with rating and text -> See review attached to counterparty profile
/#trades -> Open in-progress trade -> Attempt to submit review -> See validation message stating review can be submitted only after trade is completed

features.name: Credits System
features.description: View current credit balance and browse transaction history for earned and spent credits.
user_flows: /#dashboard -> See current credit balance in navbar -> Open transaction history panel -> See list of credit transactions
/#create-listing -> Set credit price -> Submit form -> See credit price reflected on listing in marketplace

features.name: Smart Matching
features.description: Automatically surface recommended listings based on the user's declared requirements and profile.
user_flows: /#marketplace -> See smart matching row of recommended listings based on requirements -> Select a recommended listing -> Initiate trade

features.name: Report & Block System
features.description: Allow users to report listings or block other users; blocked users' listings are hidden from the blocker.
user_flows: /#marketplace -> Select listing -> Report listing with reason -> See confirmation that report was submitted
/#profile -> Block user -> Navigate to /#marketplace -> See blocked user's listings removed from results

features.name: Admin System
features.description: Admin users view moderation queues, resolve reports, and manage user status from an admin dashboard.
user_flows: /#admin -> View reports list -> Open a report -> Resolve report -> See report status updated to resolved
/#admin -> Open users directory -> Flag a user as banned -> See user flagged in directory

features.name: Profile Management
features.description: View and update personal profile information, location, and preferences.
user_flows: /#profile -> See profile details -> Edit name or location -> Save changes -> See updated profile details

features.name: Notifications
features.description: Receive in-app notifications for messages, trade updates, and reviews.
user_flows: /#dashboard -> See notification badge update -> Open notifications panel -> See list of recent notifications -> Select notification to view related item

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: User Signup
features.description: Multi-step signup flow

features.name: Marketplace Discovery
features.description: View and filter listings
user_interactions: Verify own listings are not shown

features.name: Create Listing
features.description: Add a new listing to the marketplace

features.name: Trade Flow
features.description: Initiate and manage trades

features.name: Messaging
features.description: Chat with users

features.name: Review System
features.description: Leave a review
